layout.structure: Single centered page, elegant vertical flow, generous padding.

surfaces.main_card: bg-[#080810]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#9D6FE8]/20 hover:border-[#9D6FE8]/40 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(157,111,232,0.15)] transition-all duration-500 rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-12
surfaces.input_box: bg-[#080810] border border-[#9D6FE8]/30 focus:border-[#9D6FE8] focus:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(157,111,232,0.3)] transition-all rounded-lg p-4 w-full text-[#EDE8F5] resize-none
surfaces.result_box: bg-[#0a0a14] border border-[#9D6FE8]/20 relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl p-6

components.button_primary: bg-[#6C3FC5] text-[#EDE8F5] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-body font-medium hover:bg-[#7b48e0] relative overflow-hidden group transition-all w-full md:w-auto flex justify-center items-center
components.button_shimmer: absolute inset-0 -translate-x-full bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#C9A84C]/30 to-transparent group-hover:animate-[shimmer_1.5s_infinite]
components.separator: h-[1px] w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#C9A84C]/50 to-transparent my-10
components.step_label: text-[#C9A84C] font-heading text-xl italic mb-4 flex items-center gap-4

animations.animated_border: absolute inset-0 rounded-xl border border-transparent [background:linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,rgba(157,111,232,0.3),transparent)_border-box] [mask-composite:exclude] animate-[spin_4s_linear_infinite]

visual_enhancers.radial_glow: fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-[#6C3FC5]/15 rounded-full blur-[120px] pointer-events-none z-0

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Add custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter, DM Mono) via Google Fonts.
Apply the global background using `background_base`, `radial_glow`, and `dot_grid` elements behind the main content (ensure they have z-0 while content has z-10).
Ensure the layout is centered with a max-width of 820px, utilizing generous padding.
Form Elements: Customize Shadcn UI components. Use near-black background and thin purple borders glowing on focus for Textarea and Select.
Main Card: Wrap the core application in the `main_card` surface style for a dark glassmorphism effect.
Buttons: All primary action buttons must be pill-shaped (`rounded-full`) and include the gold shimmer hover effect (`button_shimmer`).
Results Section: Use `DM Mono` for prompt outputs. Implement the subtle `fade_in` animation.
Steps: Separate logic sections with the gold `separator` and precede them with `step_label` (e.g., 'I. Ideation', 'II. Refinement').
Include standard Lucide React icons where necessary.
CRITICAL: Always include `data-testid` attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns).
